title: Hunting: AD Attack Timeline - Multi-Stage Credential Attack Chain
description: Correlates credential attack stages across Windows Security Events: failed logons (4625), explicit creds (4648), privilege escalation (4672 with SeDebug), Kerberos TGS (4769), directory replication (4662), and credential reads (5379). Identifies hosts exhibiting 3+ stages indicating an active attack chain.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' in ('4625', '4648', '4672', '4769', '4662', '5379') | eval AttackStage = case('Event ID' = '4625', 'BruteForce', 'Event ID' = '4648', 'CredentialDelegation', 'Event ID' = '4672', 'PrivilegeEscalation', 'Event ID' = '4769', 'Kerberos_TGS', 'Event ID' = '4662', 'DirectoryReplication', 'Event ID' = '5379', 'CredentialManagerRead', 'Unknown') | stats count as TotalEvents, distinctcount(AttackStage) as StageCount, distinctcount('Event ID') as UniqueEventTypes by Entity | where StageCount >= 3 | sort -TotalEvents
